pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0523)

output.summary: Multi-pass streaming score-first legal TTT ensembles three shifted passes, taking each token’s min NLL so late-stage adaptation benefits every position.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts solely on validation tokens by scoring them first then training in multiple passes before reporting validation metrics.
techniques: Multi-pass streaming score-first TTT with min-NLL ensembling
Per-pass torch.inference_mode scoring before training to maintain legality
Rotary cache clone fix for backprop through partial RoPE
